title: Tua Lai Ka Om Nuam Hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A sap mi gam nuam ah om nuam ing,
A nopna kam in gen zawh hi lo;
Jesuh tawh a tawntung om nuam ing.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: tawh a tawntung om nuam ing;
Jesuh tawh a tawntung om nuam

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lai Siangtho sung thu ka theih ciangin,
Tua gam i tun ciang om nawn lo ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: nuam a hoihna gam nuam sungah,
Sihna lungkhamna om nawn lo ding;
Sihna om lo nun nop gam nuam ah.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua gam nuam sungah om thei dingin,
A thuciam bang a um khempeuhte,
A tawntung tua gam ah om ding hi.
